name: Performapal Turn Toad
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヒックリカエル
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; switch its current ATK and DEF until the end of this turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
Once per turn, during your Battle Phase (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 monster you control; change its battle position, and if you do, switch its current ATK and DEF until the end of this turn.
pend_eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; switch its current ATK and DEF until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Battle Phase (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 monster you control; change its battle position, and if you do, switch its current ATK and DEF until the end of this turn.
eff: Once per turn, during your Battle Phase (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 monster you control; change its battle position, and if you do, switch its current ATK and DEF until the end of this turn.
